narrative:
Wells Twp township has 1,628 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points.
